mqtt_telemetry.description: Node telemetry, position, and status from Meshtastic radios via dedicated MQTT broker

radio_serial.description: Direct connection to locally-attached Meshtastic radio hardware

fleet_health.description: Device registry, health status, alerts for all managed radios

lost_node_locator.description: GPS position tracking and lost node location queries

config_management.description: Golden config templates, drift detection, remote config push

provisioning.description: Bench provisioning status and device registration

notification_channels.notes: Telegram retired in Jenn v6.3.0. Slack (Block Kit) is the primary channel. See CROSS_PROJECT_CONTRACT.md Section 23.
